## Problem

What practical workflow is missing or awkward today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Why It Fits RepoTools

Explain why this stays aligned with the local utility focus and does not turn the app into an IDE.

## Extra Context

Add examples, screenshots, or related tools if helpful.
